name: superworkflows
description: Persistent robotics AI Coding Loop Engineering with staged skills, adversarial review, resumable run state, evidence integrity, safety gates, and controlled learning.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent robotics AI Coding Loop Engineering
interface.longDescription: Superworkflows runs resumable robotics engineering loops through repository exploration, planning, isolated implementation, adversarial review, remediation, evidence capture, integration, validation, release gating, and approval-controlled learning. It never treats installation or invocation as authorization to push, deploy, publish, or operate a real robot.
defaultPrompt: $superworkflows — route, start, or resume a robotics Loop Engineering task.
$status — inspect and validate the active run read-only.
